name: My employer saw my AI chats about work injury—retaliation risk in Indy?
description: Risky—chats expose you; protect with counsel.[1]

mainEntity.name: My employer saw my AI chats about work injury—retaliation risk in Indy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Risky—chats expose you; protect with counsel.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: High risk if chats suggest faking; discoverable in workers' comp.[1] Key factors: no confidentiality; used for credibility attacks; anti-retaliation laws.[1] File OSHA if fired; document harassment; union if applicable.[1] Lawyer shields communications.
